product.name: FunStick 36" x 200" Charcoal Black Contact Paper Solid Black Peel and Stick Wallpaper Removable Self Adhesive Wall Paper Roll Waterproof Black Vinyl Adhesive Wallpaper for Walls Cabinets Table Desk
features: 𝐀𝐓𝐓𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: This is dark grey contact paper close to charcoal black color.
𝐅𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐔𝐑𝐄𝐒: Peel and stick, self adhesive, removable, bubble free, repositionable. Without stay sticky residue and damage the surface.
𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐑𝐋: Durable thick vinyl matte black contact paper. Waterproof, oil proof, moisture-proof and easy to clean.
𝐒𝐈𝐙𝐄: 36x 200 inches, 90CM x 5M. Easy to match, can be used in large area. The gridlines on the back can make you measure and cut easily. Better with two people to install.

𝐒𝐔𝐈𝐓𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄: Black peel and stick wallpaper can be used in smooth, dry and clean surface. Such as walls, cabinets, table, desk, countertops, drawers, dresser, shelves, bathroom, vanity, wardrobe, bookcase, furniture, bedroom, backsplash, living room and so on.
𝐆𝐔𝐀𝐑𝐀𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐄: There may be slight color difference due to different light and screens monitor. If you have any questions about our charcoal black wallpaper, please contact us feel free.
